# Vendor Assessment — Intake Summary

Complete this before running the assessment and paste it into Copilot Chat along
with any vendor compliance reports.

| Product / Service | |
| Business Owner (Requestor) | |

## Vendor Context

| Field | Response |
|---|---|
| Vendor Type | ☐ SaaS  ☐ On-Premises  ☐ Integration (API)  ☐ Professional Services  ☐ MSP |
| Hosting Model | ☐ Vendor-hosted  ☐ Customer-hosted  ☐ Hybrid |
| Integration Depth | ☐ None  ☐ One-way inbound  ☐ One-way outbound  ☐ Bidirectional  ☐ Admin/Privileged |
| Sole-source vendor? | ☐ Yes  ☐ No |
| Vendor had public breach in last 3 years? | ☐ Yes  ☐ No  ☐ Unknown |

## Questionnaire Responses

**Q11 — Will the Vendor have access to SHIFT Assets?** (tick all that apply)

- ☐ Access SHIFT Systems
- ☐ SHIFT Data shared with Vendor
- ☐ Customer data shared with Vendor
- ☐ None

**Q12 — If None, explanation:**

> 

---

**Q13 — Financial Impact (1–5):** ___

| Score | Description |
|---|---|
| 1 | Minimal financial loss |
| 2 | Minor financial loss |
| 3 | Moderate financial loss |
| 4 | Significant financial loss |
| 5 | Massive financial loss |

---

**Q14 — Reputational Impact (1–5):** ___

| Score | Description |
|---|---|
| 1 | Local media attention; quickly remedied |
| 2 | Local reputational damage |
| 3 | National short-term negative media coverage |
| 4 | National long-term negative coverage / significant market share loss |
| 5 | International long-term negative coverage / game-changing market share loss |

---

**Q15 — Regulatory Impact (1–5):** ___

| Score | Description |
|---|---|
| 1 | Not reportable to regulator |
| 2 | Reportable incident; no follow-up required |
| 3 | Report of breach; immediate correction required |
| 4 | Major corrective action project required |
| 5 | Prosecution, fines, litigation, incarceration of leaders |

---

**Q16 — Staff Impact (1–5):** ___

| Score | Description |
|---|---|
| 1 | Isolated staff dissatisfaction |
| 2 | General morale problems and increased turnover |
| 3 | Widespread morale problems and high turnover |
| 4 | Senior managers leave; not perceived as employer of choice |
| 5 | Multiple senior leaders leave |
